incidents.title: Dubai’s Roads and Transport Authority (RTA) adds 4 key areas to its Bus-On-Demand service across Dubai, following 136% ridership growth in 2025. The areas include: Al Qusais, Jumeirah Village Circle, Al Warqa’a and Dubai Investments Park. The latest addition brings Bus-On-Demand coverage to 17 areas, served by a fleet of 49 buses.

Dubai Media Council announces the opening of applications for the Mohammed bin Rashid Scholarship for Emirati Media Students for the 2026–2027 academic year. The scholarship offers high academic achievers or top Emirati high school graduates the opportunity to pursue a fully funded undergraduate degree programme at the American University in Dubai’s (AUD) Mohammed Bin Rashid School for Communication (MBRSC).

RT by @moiuae: Dubai Civil Defence teams successfully extinguished a fire on a docked boat in Dubai Creek within 54 minutes, with no injuries reported. Cooling operations are currently underway.

RT by @moiuae: Clarification: The fire visible in the Al Jaddaf area was caused by a boat catching fire while docked in Dubai Creek. No injuries were reported as a result of the incident. The density of the smoke was due to the burning of fiberglass materials used in the boat’s construction.…
